author: y4rr
content: [result] Added Poisson (Knuth sampling, 9 tests), LogNormal (wraps Normal, 9 tests), StudentT (Marsaglia-Tsang Chi2, 10 tests), Cauchy (inverse CDF, 10 tests), Gumbel (10 tests), HalfNormal (folded Normal, 13 tests). All with sample/log_prob/entropy and backward nodes for reparameterized sampling. 257 distribution tests pass. Still missing: Binomial, Geometric, NegativeBinomial.
